Town of Sampleton Zoning Bylaw
Part 1 Administration
1.1 Purpose
The purpose of this bylaw is to regulate land use subject to section 2.1.
1.2 Application
This bylaw applies to all lands within the municipality.
(a) No person shall use land except as provided in 6.1.4.
(i) A temporary use may be permitted under subsection 1.2.
1 This is a footnote preserved for citation audit.
Table 1 | Zone | Minimum Lot Area; Row 1 | R1 | 400 m2
Town of Sampleton Zoning Bylaw
Town of Sampleton Zoning Bylaw
Part 2 Zones
2.1 Residential Zones
Residential zones are listed in Schedule B.
Schedule B
Additional residential provisions.
Unnumbered policy-like sentence without a clear parent on a new page.
